view.params:
SELECT bzyq.SID,bzyq.bzyq
FROM bzyq
ORDER BY bzyq.SID ASC

SELECT DISTINCT(cght.sccj1)
FROM cght
WHERE   (cght.htrq>=[批量毛净体.起始日期])
   AND  (cght.htrq<=[批量毛净体.结束日期])
   AND  (cght.gdry=:gdry)
ORDER BY cght.sccj ASC

SELECT DISTINCT(cghtsheet.bjhh)
FROM cght,cghtsheet
WHERE   (cght.SID=cghtsheet.PID) and (cght.sccj1 like "%"+ [批量毛净体.专业厂家] +"%")
   AND  (cght.htrq>=[批量毛净体.起始日期])
   AND  (cght.htrq<=[批量毛净体.结束日期])
   AND  (cght.gdry=:gdry)  AND (cght.xjht="新") and  (cght.sfhz="通过")
